ddls:
CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "run_history_config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run history configuration */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance the run was executed on */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Response value (y) of the run */,
  "censored" INTEGER /* Whether the run was censored or not */,
  "cutoff_time_used" INTEGER /* Cutoff time used for the run */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed used for the run */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the run */,
  "run_length" INTEGER /* Length of the run */,
  "run_result_code" INTEGER /* Result code of the run */,
  "run_quality" REAL /* Quality of the run */,
  "smac_iteration" INTEGER /* SMAC iteration the run was executed in */,
  "smac_cumulative_runtime" INTEGER /* Cumulative runtime of the SMAC iteration */,
  "run_result" TEXT /* Result of the run (e.g., SAT, UNSAT) */,
  "additional_algorithm_run_data" TEXT /* Additional algorithm run data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  "run_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run type (e.g., SAT, UNSAT) */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this run belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_run_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_type_id") REFERENCES run_types ("run_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_run_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_history_config_id") REFERENCES run_history_configs ("run_history_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_history_configs" (
  "run_history_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run history configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the run history configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the run history configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the config was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the config was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_history_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instance */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of the instance (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "instance_size" TEXT /* Size of the instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_types" (
  "run_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run type */,
  "run_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the run type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the run type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_runs" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial-run relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial-run relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id", "run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_metadata" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "metadata_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_versions" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the run */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role" TEXT /* Role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role", "permission")
)
